โพรียูรีเทน
รวมข้อ 2.8 งานทาสี

warnings: One of 2 split sheets on this source PNG (หน้า82); sibling is _หน้า82_1_stairs_railing_boq.json. This is the physical LEFT half of the landscape scan (rotate 90 degrees counter-clockwise to read), the higher-numbered sheet (แผ่นที่ 12/20), paired with แผ่นที่ 11/20 extracted as _1.json.

This house's หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม rollup (sheet 4/20, หน้า78_2) listed only 8 sub-items ending at 2.8 งานทาสี -- this sheet confirms 2.8 is indeed งานทาสี (paint), consistent with that earlier rollup, and with the item 2 (หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม) category now fully covered end-to-end across sheets 4/20 through 12/20 with no missing sub-item.

Complete on this single sheet with its own 'รวมข้อ 2.8' subtotal row -- this is also the LAST sub-item of หมวดงานสถาปัตยกรรม (item 2); the next sheet (13/20) is expected to start a new top-level category (หมวดงานระบบสุขาภิบาล, item 3) or its rollup.
All unit-price/amount columns are blank in the source for every row -- transcribed as null, not invented.
All quantities re-verified at high zoom after rotating a programmatic crop of the left half (368, 469, 9, 8, 83).
